title: galium suecicum
intro: Galium suecicum, also known as Swedish wood-rue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Galium suecicum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Galium suecicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to support overall well-being.
